qa_pairs.question: What specific format must a private key adhere to for use in decrypting a Windows virtual machine password within OpenStack?
qa_pairs.answer: To decrypt a Windows VM password in OpenStack, your private key must be in OpenSSH format and must not be protected by a passphrase.

qa_pairs.question: Which types of private key formats are not compatible with OpenStack for decrypting Windows virtual machine passwords?
qa_pairs.answer: OpenStack will not work with private keys in OpenSSH format that have a passphrase, nor will it work with keys in the ssh.com format, for decrypting Windows virtual machine passwords.
